headline: Analog Devices (ADI) Gains from Its Core Industrial and Automotive Markets Strength
summary: Mar Vista Investment Partners, LLC, an investment management company, released its “Mar Vista U.S. Quality Strategy” first-quarter 2026 investor letter. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. U.S. equities entered 2026 with sustained momentum, despite market leadership evolving significantly over the first quarter. Initial support in equities was hampered by tariff uncertainty, doubts […]

headline: Why Analog Devices (ADI) Just Landed On A High-Conviction Watchlist
summary: Analog Devices, Inc. (NASDAQ:ADI) is among the 10 High-Flying AI Stocks to Buy. On April 6, Citi added Analog Devices, Inc. (NASDAQ:ADI) to its “upside 30-day catalyst watch” ahead of Q1 results while maintaining a Buy rating and a $400 price target, citing expectations for stronger-than-consensus performance driven by improving analog pricing. headline: B of A Securities Maintains Buy on Analog Devices, Raises Price Target to $425
summary: B of A Securities  analyst Vivek Arya   maintains Analog Devices (NASDAQ:ADI) with a Buy and raises the price target from $400 to $425.
